instructions: Refactor and improve the kit to match specs and improve reusability across use cases. Componentize more of the mock-specific structures, converge visuals toward the local mocks, improve dark mode, fix accessibility issues, deepen Storybook controls and example parity, and iterate until completion.

Trace shared runtime surfaces across `src/components/**`, `src/mockups/**`, Storybook stories, shared CSS, example app files, and local uploaded mock/spec images under `project/uploads/` where relevant.

Be explicit about which surfaces are still page-local, which controls/stories are too shallow, where dark-mode hierarchy is weak, and where hover/active/disabled/chat/docs/code contexts still risk accessibility regressions.
prompt.task: Trace the live kit surfaces, local spec anchors, and the highest-value blockers to componentization, pixel-fit, dark mode, and a11y.

title: Trace full kit surfaces, spec anchors, and reuse blockers

inputs.requestText: Refactor and improve the kit to match specs and improve reusability across use cases. Componentize more of the mock-specific structures, converge visuals toward the local mocks, improve dark mode, fix accessibility issues, deepen Storybook controls and example parity, and iterate until completion.
